aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Patterson Heating & Air Conditioning due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, despite having a decent online presence.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Add FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate; the address is missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website footer or contact page.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No structured data for reviews or testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Elk Grove, CA, where AI may prioritize more AI-optimized competitors.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide clear business information and answers to common queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed content on maintenance tips, energy efficiency, and local climate considerations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Patterson is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, and their GBP lacks active engagement, making them less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Patterson as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer Patterson waits, the more ground they lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Patterson Heating & Air Conditioning
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for the AI-driven future.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
